title: On-Site TSA PreCheck® Enrollment Initiative with United Airlines Launches at Denver International Airport in Concourse B
text: DENVER , Aug. 15, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- IDEMIA Identity and Security (I&S) North America, the long-time authorized TSA PreCheck enrollment provider, announced a new TSA PreCheck enrollment initiative at Denver International Airport in collaboration with United Airlines.
